title: Characterization of flexible RNA binding by tandem RNA recognition motifs through integrative ensemble modelling
author: Nguyen, Cristina K. X.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Primary and processed experimental data, MMMx modelling and analysis scripts, and ensemble models for a study on RNA binding to the tandem RNA-recongnition motifs of Serine/arginine-rich splicing factor 1 (SRSF1). The set comprises the following data and scripts: 
 
 Primary DEER (EPR) data for the free protein and for complexes with RNA UCAUUGGAU as well as UGGAUUUUUCAU 
 Processed DEER data (distance distributions) 
 RigiFlex ensemble modelling scripts for the free protein and the two complexes to be run with MMMx 
 EnsembleFit (MMMx) scripts, including NMR paramagnetic relaxation enhancement (PRE) restraints 
 EnsembleAnalysis scripts (MMMx) for analyzing the incomplete disorder-to-order transitions from free SRSF1 to the two RNA complexes 
 ensemble models for the free protein and for complexes with RNA UCAUUGGAU as well as UGGAUUUUUCAU obtained with RigiFlex in MMMx 
 ensemble models for the free protein and for complexes with RNA UCAUUGGAU as well as UGGAUUUUUCAU obtained by a CYANA multistate computation followed by ensemble reweighting by MMMx  
 ensemble models obtained with different approaches for generating the initial conformer pool and different reweighing procedures 
 superensembles obtained by jackknife resampling
